title: Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A spicy and flavorful dish from the Malaysian region, typically served over steaming hot rice. This recipe combines tender chicken with a rich and creamy curry sauce.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the curry paste to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, brown sugar, and red pepper flakes to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-10 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until heated through.
Serve the chicken and curry sauce over steamed rice, garnished with fresh cilantro.
